recommendations.title: Waxwork II: Lost in Time
recommendations.overview: The survivors of the first Waxwork must use a portal through time to defeat the evil that has followed them and turned their lives upside down.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser III: Hell on Earth
recommendations.overview: Pinhead is set loose on the sinful streets of New York City to create chaos with a fresh cadre of Cenobitic kin.

recommendations.title: Warlock: The Armageddon
recommendations.overview: Every six hundred years, a great evil has the opportunity to escape and unleash Armageddon. A group of five stones has the power to either free the evil, or banish it for another six hundred years. An order of Druids battles with a Warlock determined

recommendations.title: Waxwork
recommendations.overview: Wealthy slacker college student Mark, his new girlfriend Sarah, and their friends are invited to a special showing at a mysterious wax museum which displays 18 of the most evil men of all time. After his ex-girlfriend and another friend disappear, Ma

recommendations.title: No Time to Die
recommendations.overview: Bond has left active service and is enjoying a tranquil life in Jamaica. His peace is short-lived when his old friend Felix Leiter from the CIA turns up asking for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Generations
recommendations.overview: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

recommendations.title: Ek Tha Tiger
recommendations.overview: A top Indian agent is sent to observe the actions of a scientist but the mission complicates when he falls in love with the scientist's Pakistani caretaker.

recommendations.title: The Old Man and the Sea
recommendations.overview: An old fisherman makes the biggest catch of his life.

recommendations.title: Natural City

recommendations.title: The Seven Deadly Sins: Grudge of Edinburgh Part 2
recommendations.overview: Reunited with Lancelot for the first time since their tragic accident, Tristan must learn to conquer his inner demons in order to save his mother's life.
